name: NSW Risk-Criticality Blend (approved 5-dimension model)
description: The approved BIS prioritisation design seeded as the default model: criticality = weighted 5 manual dimensions; tier = round(criticality); residual = likelihood x tier; priority = blend(riskN, critN, stratN). Aggregation DELEGATES to srv/lib/prioritisation.js (byte-identical, zero regression). LIKELIHOOD enters multiplicatively via residual, not the weighted sum — its catalogue weight is therefore 0 (informational). Per-model knobs remain in PrioritisationConfig (global row).

name: NSW Standards Parameter Pack (configurable rule engine)
description: Standards-based parameter pack (ISO 55000/31000/13822/55010, AASHTO MBE/LRFR, FHWA NBI, PIARC, Eurocode, CS 454/470, Austroads/AS 5100, NSW BHI): 37 catalogue criteria + 6 manual judgement criteria; per-class weights for Road/Rail/Pedestrian/Shared Path Bridge; non-compensatory SafetyFloor/Escalate/HurdleMin rules + confidence down-weighting. Missing data is flagged, never silently zeroed.
